     the Fermi energy is    -0.8276 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.58509574 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000004 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19690919 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.38818655 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -322413.91346780 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  162659.77113430 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6093.03180481 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  151084.64686165 Ry
